constantsChosen.BRANCH_HALF_GAP: 140px (center-to-center 280px between the two arm columns; 80px gap between two 200px cards; HALF_GAP_COLS = 140/colWidth = 140/240)
constantsChosen.EMPTY_ARM_LANE: 28px (side-lane offset used ONLY by an empty/passthrough arm so its + sits on its own side column, never over the other arm's card; successor to the removed ARM_LANE)
constantsChosen.RAIL_INSET: 22px (unchanged; topKneeCrossY = from.y + RAIL_INSET puts the single knee near the TOP for a populated arm)
constantsChosen.MIN_SEGMENT: 64px (unchanged; the long lower leg of a top-knee arm ~76px clears it)

e2eSummary: campaign-builder 17/17 (incl. new 'populated arms render as COMPACT straight columns'); campaign-node-editors + campaign-list-detail + campaign-list-no-overflow + campaign-canvas-pan-zoom 21/21; campaign-lifecycle + campaign-publish-gate + campaign-versioning + campaign-journey-smoke 7/7. All run SOLO, ports freed + pkill before each.
notes: Single-knee compact-column branch layout. assignColumns places a condition's two arms at center +/- BRANCH_HALF_GAP (widened only by a nested subtree's half-width via shiftSubtree; shared diamond joins skipped and re-centered by recenterJoins). computeEdges: a POPULATED arm gets laneX = child column x AND kneeTop=true (single TOP knee, the + and child share the column); an EMPTY arm (edge straight to the multi-parent merge join, or to a node directly below the If) keeps a +/- EMPTY_ARM_LANE side lane so its + never overlaps the sibling card. orthogonalPath/verticalAnchor gained a kneeTop mode (jogTopKnee + topKneeCrossY): short stub down from If center, ONE knee across to the child column near the top, LONG vertical straight down the column; the + anchors mid the long lower leg at to.x. ARM_LANE removed. Lint = the 7 known pre-existing react-hooks 'rule not found' errors only (no new). Version bumped 0.41.5 -> 0.41.6. Not committed/pushed (orchestrator commits).
